title: Read canonical producer component in Chronik history queries
goal: Correct the Chronik history component filter so producer identity is read from source.component, while subject remains reserved for the scoped work target and existing target, operation, task-class and outcome filters remain unchanged.

acceptance.assertion: query_history(component=...) matches canonical source.component and does not require or fabricate subject.component.
Repository- and host-scoped subject identity remains the work target and is not reinterpreted as producer identity.
Any compatibility behavior for historical noncanonical records is explicit, tested and cannot override a present canonical source.component.
Tests cover repository and host subjects, positive and negative producer matches, and combinations with repo, operation, task-class and outcome filters.
A deployed query including component=grabowski returns the observed HausKI completion event and preserves ledger-integrity diagnostics.
Chronik tests, local validation, GitHub CI, deploy and post-deploy query pass at the exact reviewed head.

rollback.trigger: The change confuses producer and target identity, broadens matches unexpectedly or weakens ledger validation.
rollback.procedure: Restore the previous query implementation, retain the scoped-event schema and require callers to omit the component filter until a corrected reviewed patch is deployed.

conditions: a foreign Chronik worktree, lease or process overlaps coding_memory.py or its tests
the fix would rewrite stored events instead of correcting query interpretation
source.component is absent from canonical current producer events

live_finding.root_cause: query_history compares component to subject.component although canonical producer identity lives in source.component.

coordination.decision: register only; do not overlap the active T006 worktree or leases

does_not_establish: failure of repository, operation, task-class or outcome filters
permission to modify the active T006 worktree
need to rewrite the append-only ledger
